caption:
W Bangkok is a stunning city hotel offering stylish rooms and suites designed for an unforgettable stay✨

A perfect mix of contemporary comfort and vibrant design 🌆, featuring a spa, gym, outdoor pool🌊, and a heritage gem, The House on Sathorn 

Located in the heart of Bangkok’s commercial district, just steps from the BTS Skytrain🚆

📍 W Bangkok, 106 N S Sathon Rd, Si Lom, Bang Rak, Bangkok 10500 @wbangkok
